title: Fix clang_check_attributes fields pylint warning
body:
@kamilrakoczy when you get a chance can you please fix this last remaining pylint warning on master, thanks.

```
$ make lint-py
pylint --score=n --disable=R0801 bin/verilator_ccache_report bin/verilator_difftree bin/verilator_gantt bin/verilator_includer bin/veri\
lator_profcfunc examples/xml_py/vl_file_copy examples/xml_py/vl_hier_graph docs/guide/conf.py docs/bin/vl_sphinx_extract docs/bin/vl_sphinx_fix src/astgen src/bisonpre src/config_rev src/cppcheck_filtered src/flexfix src/vlcovgen test_regress/t/*.pf nodist/clang_check_attributes nodist/code_coverage nodist/dot_importer nodist/fuzzer/actual_fail nodist/fuzzer/generate_dictionary nodist/install_test
************* Module clang_check_attributes
nodist/clang_check_attributes:960:29: E3701: Invalid usage of field(), it should be used within a dataclass or the make_dataclass() function. (invalid-field-call)
```
